# svelte-jsonschema-form v3

## Documentation Sets

- [Abridged documentation](https://x0k.github.io/svelte-jsonschema-form/llms-small.txt): a compact version of the documentation for svelte-jsonschema-form v3, with non-essential content removed
- [Complete documentation](https://x0k.github.io/svelte-jsonschema-form/llms-full.txt): the full documentation for svelte-jsonschema-form v3

## Notes

- The complete documentation includes all content from the official documentation
- The content is automatically generated from the same source as the official documentation
